messages.content:
```python
data = read_pretty_jsonl(
    f"/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmit/user/lvchengqi/ckpt_llmit1/xtuner_v1/monet/monet-30ba3-expertfp8-1e-6lr-8minibatch-math-no-overlong-filter/20260211065413/rollout_idx_10_trajectory.jsonl",
    "math",
)
correct_tokens = []
incorrect_tokens = []
for d in data:
    reward = d["reward"]
    response_len = d["response_len"]
    if reward > 0:
        correct_tokens.append(response_len)
    else:
        incorrect_tokens.append(response_len)
```
帮我画一下correct和incorrect token的直方图

```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# 创建图形
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))

# 绘制 correct tokens 直方图
axes[0].hist(correct_tokens, bins=50, color='green', alpha=0.7, edgecolor='black')
axes[0].set_xlabel('Token Length', fontsize=12)
axes[0].set_ylabel('Frequency', fontsize=12)
axes[0].set_title(f'Correct Tokens Distribution\n(n={len(correct_tokens)}, mean={np.mean(correct_tokens):.1f})', fontsize=13)
axes[0].grid(axis='y', alpha=0.3)

# 绘制 incorrect tokens 直方图
axes[1].hist(incorrect_tokens, bins=50, color='red', alpha=0.7, edgecolor='black')
axes[1].set_xlabel('Token Length', fontsize=12)
axes[1].set_ylabel('Frequency', fontsize=12)
axes[1].set_title(f'Incorrect Tokens Distribution\n(n={len(incorrect_tokens)}, mean={np.mean(incorrect_tokens):.1f})', fontsize=13)
axes[1].grid(axis='y', alpha=0.3)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('token_distribution.png', dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()

# 打印统计信息
print(f"Correct tokens - Count: {len(correct_tokens)}, Mean: {np.mean(correct_tokens):.2f}, Std: {np.std(correct_tokens):.2f}")
print(f"Incorrect tokens - Count: {len(incorrect_tokens)}, Mean: {np.mean(incorrect_tokens):.2f}, Std: {np.std(incorrect_tokens):.2f}")
```

如果你想要在同一个图中对比两者，可以用这个版本：

```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# 创建叠加直方图
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))

plt.hist(correct_tokens, bins=50, color='green', alpha=0.6, label=f'Correct (n={len(correct_tokens)})', edgecolor='black')
plt.hist(incorrect_tokens, bins=50, color='red', alpha=0.6, label=f'Incorrect (n={len(incorrect_tokens)})', edgecolor='black')

plt.xlabel('Token Length', fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel('Frequency', fontsize=12)
plt.title('Token Length Distribution: Correct vs Incorrect', fontsize=14)
plt.legend(fontsize=11)
plt.grid(axis='y', alpha=0.3)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('token_distribution_overlay.png', dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()

# 打印统计信息
print(f"Correct tokens - Count: {len(correct_tokens)}, Mean: {np.mean(correct_tokens):.2f}, Std: {np.std(correct_tokens):.2f}, Median: {np.median(correct_tokens):.2f}")
print(f"Incorrect tokens - Count: {len(incorrect_tokens)}, Mean: {np.mean(incorrect_tokens):.2f}, Std: {np.std(incorrect_tokens):.2f}, Median: {np.median(incorrect_tokens):.2f}")
```

你更喜欢哪种展示方式？
